title: EnrichSummary
description: Final summary NDJSON line emitted by `sqlite-graphrag enrich`. Always the last line. The 'summary' sentinel field distinguishes it from per-item events.

summary.description: Sentinel field; always true. Distinguishes this line from per-item events.

operation.description: Rust Debug format of the EnrichOperation variant (e.g. 'MemoryBindings', 'EntityDescriptions', 'BodyEnrich').

items_total.description: Total items discovered by the scan phase.

skipped.description: Items skipped (filtered out or not-yet-implemented operation).

cost_usd.description: Cumulative LLM cost in USD. Zero for dry-run and OAuth runs.
